name: Quickbooks
highlight_text: Category: Best for small agencies that want mainstream accounting with strong invoicing & payments
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__Source: G2

What Quickbooks Does

Quickbooks is the household name for SMB accounting. This marketing agency billing software is often the first stop because it handles taxes, payroll, expenses, and billing with a huge app ecosystem.

Key Features

  • Invoices & quotes/estimates, recurring invoices, online payments.
  • Receipt capture, mileage, multicurrency (plan-dependent).

Pricing

  • Simple Start: $38
  • Essentials: $75
  • Plus: $115
  • Advanced: $275 per month 

Discounts are available for the first three months of use.

Pros

✅ Familiar workflows; strong invoicing capabilities and reminders.
✅ Scales across plans with user controls.

✅ Widely documented; team onboarding is straightforward.

Cons

🚫 Interface depth can feel heavy vs “light” agency tools. 

🚫 Certain complexity that may require basic accounting experience.

🚫 Some mixed reviews about the customer and technical support.

‍
what_people_say:
What Customers Say

“Helps me keep track of all my invoices, payments and taxes in one place… save time every month.”

- Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.
